summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to filter by aircraft type
For each APU (identified by serialno), select only the row with the maximum ref_date to get the latest reference date
acceptance_criteria: Query returns APU part numbers, serial numbers, and PSN identifiers for all B737NG aircraft
Query includes aircraft registration for each APU
Query shows only the latest reference date for each APU
CT5 trend type and CT5ATP values are correctly populated
Workorder information is included when present
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query uses AMOS Acceptance as source database
Query can be switched to AMOS Production when system goes live
